events.title: NYC Healthcare Builders Rooftop Mixer
events.address: 148 Lafayette St, New York, NY 10013, USA
events.description:
Please join us for an evening on our newly unveiled rooftop on July 14th, hosted by General Catalyst, Mercury & Chelsea Commons.

We're bringing together a group of NYC's most promising young AI builders with founders and operators from the NYC ecosystem who are building at the intersection of AI and healthcare. The evening will include a rooftop reception, ice cream, and a brief, informal discussion with a few of our portfolio founders.

Our hope is to spark real connections between emerging builders and the founders behind some of the most innovative healthcare companies. Whether you're early in your career, thinking about starting something, or just curious about building in healthcare, we'd love to have you join us.

events.title: 🏆 Builders Cup 2026 - A Hackathon by Ramp
events.description:
Presented by Ramp and sponsored by Cursor, Codex, and Chelsea Commons.

The ball is in your court. Build something that matters.

Ramp is hosting Builders Cup, a one-day hackathon in New York City where top builders compete for prizes, glory, and a chance to impress some of the fastest-growing tech companies in the world.

Join with a team of 2 to 4 builders to ship something real, show what you’ve got, and compete for bragging rights, plus some cool prizes.

Expect a full day of hacking, mentorship, demos, and yes - very good food.

💰 Prizes

We're awarding across four tracks:

Audience Favorite — the crowd decides. Most votes wins.Best Game — built something fun? This one's for you.Save Time. Save Money. — build anything that saves people time and money.Best Use of Our Sponsors — more details soon.

🗓️ Day of Schedule

10AM — Doors Open - coffee, networking, find your people

10:30AM — Kickoff remarks from Ramp and our sponsors

11AM — Hacking starts

12:45PM — Lunch

3:30PM — Demos + awards ceremony

🛠️ What to Expect

Cursor + Codex workshops: live zero-to-one workshops so you can hit the ground running - credits includedMentors on-site to help you shipCareer fair-style demos: you present at your station, the crowd votes, top builders get the spotlightPrizes for winnersFood, coffee, and good vibes all day

👤 Who Should Join

CS or software engineering students graduating 2027 or laterAble to attend in-person in New York City (no travel sponsorship at this time)Builders of any experience level — teams 2 to 4 members welcomeYou don't need an idea yet. You just need to show up ready to build.

📍 Location

Flatiron District, NYC — exact address shared upon RSVP confirmation.

events.title: Chelsea Commons Dinner [Hosted by Chelsea Commons x Menlo Ventures x Rho]
events.description:
Join us for a private dinner in Follia’s wine cellar for exceptional young builders. By invitation only.

#nyc

Meet the hosts:

Chelsea Commons is a summer community for ambitious interns in NYC. Built by 12 interns living together in Manhattan.

Menlo Ventures is an early-stage venture capital firm that invests across AI, consumer, enterprise, and healthcare technologies.

Rho is the all-in-one banking platform for startups and the accountants supporting them. With banking setup in minutes, cashback cards, and powerful tools for managing spend, paying bills, and closing the books, Rho helps high-growth startups move fast and stay focused, backed by support that goes to the end of the earth to help you win.

Rho is a fintech company, not a bank. Checking and card services are provided by Webster Bank, N.A., member FDIC; savings account services are provided by American Deposit Management Co. and its partner banks.
